meaning: n.使者的派遣,公使馆(全体人员)
examples: The embassy was downgraded to a legation.
Our legation was upgraded to an embassy.
We were still at the legation at Eaton Place.
At age 26 he was appointed Minister to the Netherlands, then promoted to the Berlin Legation.
The American legation was taken from Berlin by special train to the town of Bad Nauheim, where it was interned, incommunicado, under the supervision of the Gestapo.
